title: Lust and Agony in Netori:The Ritual of Despair
description:
⏹︎ To all NTR enthusiasts-Hello to every gentleman and lady who loves some good H, 
We're ロケット☆ペンギン！

Our second memorable game is "Inshoku Village" × "NTR"!!

Players will control the heroine, will she escape the clutches of NTR, or will she willingly succumb to the village's depraved customs...?

In addition to plenty of steamy 18+ scenes, we've implemented "grope events" too!
Plus sexy costume variations, look forward to it♪

 

⏹︎ The village's custom—no, its "lewd custom", comes crashing in—The story begins when the heroine Chinastu, due to her husband's job loss, moves with him and their daughter to his family village.

The village is called "Netori Village."
It's a famous tourist spot known for its grand festivals, and one of the rare places in recent years that's actively increasing its birth rate.

All the villagers of "Netori Village" seem united like one big family, 
yet there is one custom they must obey..."

"Men and women may cross the boundaries of marriage and love freely."

Chinastu's father-in-law, Hoshikawa Tatsuo
Her husband's old friend and current village chief, Netori Ryuzo
With them leading the way, the men and women of the village begin to close in on her step by step...

 

⏹︎ "Refuse" or "accept", the choice is yours

Those who follow the village custom will approach the heroine in every possible way.

Whether to "refuse" or "accept"...

The player's decision will greatly diverge the story, leading to different endings for the heroine.

 

⏹︎ A gradually changing married woman

As life in the village progresses, the heroine herself begins to change...

She starts wearing the festival clothing of "Netori Festival" without shame, 
and eventually strips everything off—

not just letting the villagers toy with her freely, but engaging actively by herself—

 

⏹︎ The festival of lust and agony is about to begin—
description_short: After moving back to her husband's childhood village, Chinastu discovers that beneath its peace lies a forbidden custom "Men and women may cross the boundaries of marriage and love freely."
